name: Sidama Region (Ethiopia)

colors.symbolism: the fertile highlands and agriculture of Sidama
the central band, bearing the stars
the sacrifice made in the struggle for self-administration
peace, shown in the dividing fimbriations and the stars

description: Three horizontal bands of green, blue, and red separated by thin white fimbriations, with a large white five-pointed star and three smaller white stars on the central blue band.
history: Sidama became the tenth regional state of Ethiopia in 2020, after the Sidama Zone voted in a November 2019 referendum to separate from the Southern Nations, Nationalities, and Peoples' Region. Its capital is Hawassa, and the flag was adopted with the new region.

features.role: large white star on the blue band
three smaller white stars on the blue band
